work_unit: fix scout-scan.py .planning/ false positive in health scoring
situation: scout-scan.py has_planning detection (line 623) and pending_planning_in_worktrees diff prefix (line 495) only checked for 'planning/' directory, missing '.planning/' variant used by autonomous-engine and skills. Caused autonomous-engine to repeatedly rank #1 with score=1.0 'missing planning/' across multiple lookout rounds (documented in audit-cycle-state _status_note as recurring false positive), wasting engine cycles on non-issue recommendations.
action: Modified two sites in scripts/scout-scan.py: (1) has_planning now checks both os.path.isdir(planning/) OR os.path.isdir(.planning/); (2) pending_planning_in_worktrees diff prefix match accepts lines starting with either 'planning/' or '.planning/'. Verified post-fix: autonomous-engine scores 0.0 (was 1.0), no longer dominates #1 recommendation.
outcome_evidence: Post-fix scout-scan.py run shows autonomous-engine GATES.md='有' planning/='有' score=0.0; recommendations reordered to #1=1BfrYW9R(score=0.0), #2=autonomous-engine(score=0.0). Worktree pushed to origin/auto/opt-scout-shift-1783131286.
next_suggestion: H01+H02 still pending human merge — next round continue lookout, do not compound review backlog
Consider merging opt-scout-shift-1783131286 to eliminate false positive permanently
When pending_count reaches 0, next audit cycle triggers; candidate: wechat-main or shizi (not deep-audited recently)
